specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch - RMBO Bird Banding Station
description: Plump, medium-sized songbird - shape and spotting distinctive for thrushes. Rufous upperparts brightest on crown and nape, browner on wings and tail. Dark eye, white eye-ring, black-and-white streaked auriculars. Underparts white with heavy black spotting extending from throat onto flanks and belly. Unmarked white undertail coverts.Behaviors: N/ACall: nonePlumage: first basic
